title: NEWSEE LED Cordless Mini Table Lamp Set of 2, Rechargeable Touch Lamp with 4000mAh Battery, Vintage Bedside Lamps with Fabric Shade for Bedroom, Bar, Coffee Shop, Commercial Dining Room (Silver)
features: Portable design: This cordless table lamp features a cordless design that eliminates the need to worry about cord power. The light radiates an elegant vintage charm through the fabric shade, which enhances the sense of ambiance in the space, suitable for living room, bedroom, bedside, as well as dining room, bathroom and commercial space.

Touch switch: There is a touch control switch at the bottom of the column that emits a soft, warm 2700K warm light that is adjustable from 5% to 100% at the touch of a switch. It has a light memory function that remembers your last brightness setting, ensuring that your favorite light effect is achieved every time you turn it on. It creates a cozy and romantic atmosphere for dates, meditation, parties and other events.

Battery powered: Equipped with 4000 mAh rechargeable battery and energy-saving LED bulbs, Works without a power outlet, with USB Type-c interface, it only takes 4-6 hours to fully charge,Up to 8-24 hours of battery life with continuous use (depending on the brightness selected).

Material size wise: The lamp post and base are made of metal, durable and plated finish, even without the lights on, it is a decorative piece that reveals elegance, the overall height is 11.4 inches and the width is 4.7 inches, making it perfect for any space.

After sale Service: The vintage gold and silver cordless table lamp can be used for your own use, and the exquisite appearance can also be used as a gift for your loved ones or good friends. If you have any questions, our professional customer service team will provide you with timely support, so that you can enjoy a peace of mind and comfortable shopping experience.
description: Product Description NEWSEE LED Mini Cordless Table Lamp This cordless table lamp is free from the hassle of tangled cords, allowing you to enjoy convenient lighting anytime, anywhere. Not only can it be used in the living room, bedside, outdoor, but also can be used in coffee shops, dining bars, commercial restaurants and other places. Compact size does not take up too much desktop space, portable design easily meets most of your lighting needs. NEWSEE is a brand that focuses on customer experience. Our products are sold all over the world and are loved by consumers in all regions.We are very good at using simple methods to design products that are not simple. Such products are easy to match and not easy to be outdated. NEWSEE LED Mini Cordless Table Lamp Portable wireless desk lamp with built-in 4000mAh rechargeable battery, takes 4-6 hours to fully charge. It can be used for 8 hours at its brightest and 24 hours at its dimmest. Adopting touch control design, just touch the base switch to achieve stepless dimming, adjusting brightness and darkness at will, easily creating an ideal light environment. High quality metal material, exquisite and textured appearance, highlighting high-end taste. Provide two classic colours of gold and silver, gold retro, silver easy to match with a variety of home styles, enhance the style of the space. Retro elegant exterior design Made of selected metal materials Vintage and warm lighting As a gift for friends and family Why choose NEWSEE Table Lamps? Made of metal material for durability. Safe and convenient touch control switch. Stable and energy saving LED lamp beads Cordless design, completely free from the traditional wire. Compact body structure saves desktop space. expert after-sales support and a creative team. Parameters Colour: Gold, Silver Size: 11.9 x 29cm Material: metal + fabric lampshade Power: 3W LED Input voltage: DC5V-2A Battery capacity: 4000mAh Colour temperature: 2700K Function: Infinitely dimmable, memory function Adopt touch control design, just touch to achieve stepless dimming, adjust brightness and darkness at will, easily create the ideal light environment. The lamp is made of iron metal and coloured by high quality electroplating process, which is not only durable, but also can be used as an elegant decorative element that matches perfectly with various styles of interior. Selected LED light source with energy saving function, evenly diffused through the folding fabric lampshade, radiates soft and warm light without harming the eyes, creating a warm and romantic atmosphere.
